code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test06-MAY-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine and low CO₂, suggesting impaired renal function and possible metabolic acidosis. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, indicating possible nephrotic syndrome or diabetic nephropathy. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further assessment of renal and metabolic status.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
